steps.title: Find the Key Signal
steps.content: The passage states Adobe Flash was "discontinued in 2021," signaling a permanent shutdown. This directly indicates the software is no longer functional.

steps.title: Match the Target Meaning
steps.content: Choice A means "no longer existing or in use" — exactly matching "discontinued" in context. The other choices either describe rarity (B), common use (C), or irrelevance (D), none of which align with discontinuation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
